zh.title: 雪崩币/美元技术分析：震荡偏弱整理
zh.content:
当前AVAX/USD整体处于震荡偏弱格局，价格持续运行在20日均线下方，短线动能不足，市场多空博弈加剧，方向不明需观察突破

MACD维持轻微正值但动能柱有限，RSI缺失导致超买超卖难判，短期缺乏明确趋势信号，行情以震荡为主，建议谨慎观望避免追涨杀跌

当前支撑位位于9.22附近，若跌破可能下探9.18区域；上方阻力集中在9.30与9.35一线，突破需放量确认，短线关注变化

操作上建议以区间交易为主，低吸靠近支撑位，高抛接近阻力位，严格控制仓位与止损，等待趋势明朗后再加仓，避免情绪化交易，稳健执行，保持纪律

en.title: Avalanche vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
AVAX/USD is currently in a mild consolidation phase with a slight bearish bias as price trades below the 20-period SMA at 9.2987. The market has shown limited volatility over the past 24-hour range, with a narrow high-low range indicating indecision. Despite minor downward pressure, the structure remains largely sideways rather than trending strongly, suggesting traders are waiting for a catalyst to define direction.

Momentum signals remain mixed, with the MACD showing a marginal positive reading at 0.0033, hinting at weak bullish divergence. However, the absence of a confirmed signal line reading limits reliability. Price trading beneath the SMA(20) suggests short-term bearish pressure, though the proximity to the moving average indicates potential equilibrium. Without RSI confirmation, momentum strength remains inconclusive, reinforcing a neutral-to-slightly-bearish outlook.

Immediate support is located near the session low at 9.2235, with a deeper psychological level around 9.20 acting as secondary defense. On the upside, initial resistance is found at the 20-SMA near 9.2987, followed closely by the 9.30 psychological barrier. A sustained break above this zone could open room toward 9.35, while failure to hold support may accelerate downside pressure toward lower consolidation ranges areas.

AVAX is best approached as a range-bound market unless a decisive break occurs. Traders may consider buying near support around 9.22–9.20 with tight risk control, targeting moves back toward 9.29–9.30 resistance. Conversely, rejection at resistance may offer short opportunities. A breakout above the SMA(20) would signal bullish continuation potential, while a breakdown below 9.20 would shift bias decisively bearish and warrant defensive positioning overall strategy.
